topic: new oak barrels, structure, complexity, and spice
trigger_keywords: barricas pequeñas nuevas en vinos tintos de alta gama
aporta estructura, complejidad y notas especiadas

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Wine is matured in new oak barrels whose wood compounds have not been depleted by previous use.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: The wine extracts oak tannins and aromatic compounds such as spice, toast, and vanilla while slow oxygen ingress supports structural integration.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: New oak can add spice, complexity, and structure when its contribution is proportionate and well integrated with the fruit.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: New oak can add spice, complexity, and structure when its contribution is proportionate and well integrated with the fruit.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
